#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Tier C/D hypothesis re-verification with enhanced multi-lens evaluation.

Systematically re-evaluates all Tier C and D hypotheses using:
  1. Depth-2 n=6 expression matching (tightened: complexity + confidence gates)
  2. 3! paradigm lens (post-BREAKTHROUGH-STRATEGY: factorial vs perfect number)
  3. Cross-domain evidence aggregation
  4. Structural/qualitative assessment for non-numeric hypotheses
  5. Target-value confidence scoring (known constant > extracted number)
